text_blocks.text: Law and finance have long been driving forces in the
economy. The city is home to both the United States Court
of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit, one of 13 United States
courts of appeals, and the Federal Reserve Bank of
Richmond, one of 12 Federal Reserve Banks, as well as
offices for international companies such as Genworth Financial,
CapitalOne, Philip Morris USA, and numerous other banks and
brokerages. Richmond is also home to four of the largest law
firms in the United States: Hunton & Williams,
McGuireWoods, Williams Mullen, and LeClairRyan. Another
law firm with a major Richmond presence is Troutman Sanders,
which merged with Richmond-based Mays & Valentine LLP
